External References

Source: references.md

This file contains all external URLs referenced within the HydraR package and by its agentic workflow, as per APAF Bioinformatics standards.

Provider Documentation

  • Claude CLI: https://docs.anthropic.com/claude/reference/claude-cli
  • Gemini CLI: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai/tree/main/gemini/cli
  • GitHub Copilot CLI: https://github.com/github/gh-copilot

Project Resources

  • HydraR Documentation: https://apaf-bioinformatics.github.io/HydraR/
  • HydraR v0.2.1 Release: https://github.com/APAF-bioinformatics/HydraR/releases/tag/v0.2.1

Package Dependencies

  • R6: https://r6.r-lib.org/
  • testthat: https://testthat.r-lib.org/
  • rmarkdown: https://rmarkdown.rstudio.com/
  • Mermaid.js: https://mermaid.js.org/

Authors

  • Ignatius Pang ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9703-5741
  • Aidan Tay ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1315-4896

On this page
